Apple Apple scab.description: Apple scab is a common fungal disease of apple trees caused by Venturia inaequalis. It produces olive-green to brown spots on leaves and fruit, leading to premature leaf drop and blemished apples.
Apple Apple scab.cause: Fungal disease caused by Venturia inaequalis.
Apple Apple scab.symptoms: Olive-green to brown spots on leaves causing curling and premature drop.
Apple Apple scab.treatment: Remove infected leaves and apply fungicide. Consult an agricultural expert.
Apple Apple scab.prevention: Plant resistant varieties and apply dormant sprays in early spring.
Apple Apple scab.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Apple Apple scab.description_np: स्याउको पत्रे रोग भेन्चुरिया इनिक्वालिस नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने एक सामान्य रोग हो। यसले पात र फलमा हरियो-खैरो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Apple Apple scab.cause_np: भेन्चुरिया इनिक्वालिस नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Apple Apple scab.symptoms_np: पातमा हरियो-खैरो धब्बा देखिने, पात मर्ने र झर्ने।
Apple Apple scab.treatment_np: संक्रमित पात हटाउने र कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने। कृषि विज्ञको सल्लाह लिनुहोस्।
Apple Apple scab.prevention_np: प्रतिरोधी प्रजाति रोप्ने र प्रारम्भिक स्प्रे गर्ने।

Apple healthy.description: The apple leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration and no visible signs of disease infection.
Apple healthy.symptoms: Leaf appears healthy with normal green color.
Apple healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Apple healthy.description_np: स्याउको पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ, कुनै रोगको लक्षण देखिएको छैन।

Banana Healthy Leaf.description: The banana leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration and no visible signs of disease such as Panama disease or Sigatoka.
Banana Healthy Leaf.symptoms: Leaf appears healthy with normal green color.
Banana Healthy Leaf.prevention: Continue regular monitoring and maintain proper soil nutrients.
Banana Healthy Leaf.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Banana Healthy Leaf.description_np: केराको पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ, पानामा वा सिगाटोका जस्तो कुनै रोगको लक्षण देखिएको छैन।
Banana Healthy Leaf.prevention_np: नियमित अनुगमन गर्ने र मलखादको उचित व्यवस्थापन गर्ने।

Banana Panama Disease.description: Panama disease is a devastating fungal wilt of banana caused by Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense. It causes yellowing and wilting of leaves with vascular discoloration, and has no effective cure.
Banana Panama Disease.cause: Fungal disease caused by Fusarium oxysporum f. sp. cubense (Tropical Race 4).
Banana Panama Disease.symptoms: Yellowing and wilting of lower leaves, vascular discoloration in the stem.
Banana Panama Disease.treatment: No effective cure. Remove infected plants immediately to prevent spread.
Banana Panama Disease.prevention: Use disease-free planting material and practice crop rotation.
Banana Panama Disease.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Banana Panama Disease.description_np: केराको पानामा रोग फ्युजेरियम अक्सिस्पोरम नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने एक भयानक रोग हो। यसले पात पहेलो हुने र सुक्ने गराउँछ।
Banana Panama Disease.cause_np: फ्युजेरियम अक्सिस्पोरम नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Banana Panama Disease.symptoms_np: पात पहेलो हुने र सुक्ने, खोज्टोमा रङ्ग परिवर्तन।
Banana Panama Disease.treatment_np: यसको कुनै प्रभावकारी उपचार छैन। संक्रमित बोट तुरुन्त हटाउने।
Banana Panama Disease.prevention_np: रोगमुक्त बिरुवा प्रयोग गर्ने र बाली चक्र अपनाउने।

Banana Sigatoka Disease.description: Sigatoka is a fungal leaf spot disease of banana caused by Mycosphaerella species. It produces dark streaks and spots on leaves, reducing photosynthesis and fruit yield.
Banana Sigatoka Disease.cause: Fungal disease caused by Mycosphaerella fijiensis (Black Sigatoka) or M. musicola (Yellow Sigatoka).
Banana Sigatoka Disease.symptoms: Dark spots or streaks on leaves leading to premature leaf death.
Banana Sigatoka Disease.treatment: Apply fungicide and remove severely infected leaves. Consult an agricultural expert.
Banana Sigatoka Disease.prevention: Improve air circulation and practice regular field sanitation.
Banana Sigatoka Disease.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Banana Sigatoka Disease.description_np: केराको सिगाटोका रोग माइकोस्फेरेला जातको कवकले गर्दा हुने पात धब्बा रोग हो। यसले पातमा कालो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Banana Sigatoka Disease.cause_np: माइकोस्फेरेला फिजिएन्सिस नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Banana Sigatoka Disease.symptoms_np: पातमा कालो धब्बा देखिने र पात समयभन्दा पहिले नै सुक्ने।
Banana Sigatoka Disease.treatment_np: कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने र गम्भीर संक्रमित पात हटाउने।
Banana Sigatoka Disease.prevention_np: हावा संचार सुधार गर्ने र खेत सफा राख्ने।

Citrus Canker.description: Citrus canker is a highly contagious bacterial disease caused by Xanthomonas citri. It produces raised corky lesions on leaves, stems, and fruit, often with yellow halos, and can cause defoliation and fruit drop.
Citrus Canker.cause: Bacterial disease caused by Xanthomonas citri subsp. citri.
Citrus Canker.symptoms: Raised corky lesions on leaves, stems, and fruit with yellow halos.
Citrus Canker.treatment: Remove infected plant parts and apply copper-based bactericides.
Citrus Canker.prevention: Use disease-free seedlings and control citrus leaf miner populations.
Citrus Canker.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Citrus Canker.description_np: अन्जिरको क्यान्कर रोग जान्थोमोनास सिट्री नामक जीवाणुले गर्दा हुने अत्यन्त संक्रामक रोग हो। यसले पात र फलमा उठेको खैरो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Citrus Canker.cause_np: जान्थोमोनास सिट्री नामक जीवाणुले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Citrus Canker.symptoms_np: पात र फलमा उठेको खैरो धब्बा देखिने।
Citrus Canker.treatment_np: संक्रमित भाग हटाउने र तामा आधारित औषधि प्रयोग गर्ने।
Citrus Canker.prevention_np: रोगमुक्त बिरुवा प्रयोग गर्ने र कीरा नियन्त्रण गर्ने।

Citrus Greening.description: Citrus greening (Huanglongbing) is a fatal bacterial disease spread by psyllid insects. It causes yellow mottling of leaves, misshapen bitter fruit, and tree decline with no known cure.
Citrus Greening.cause: Bacterial disease caused by Candidatus Liberibacter asiaticus, spread by psyllids.
Citrus Greening.symptoms: Yellow mottling on leaves, misshapen fruit with bitter taste, premature drop.
Citrus Greening.treatment: No cure. Remove infected trees immediately to prevent spread.
Citrus Greening.prevention: Control psyllid populations and use certified disease-free seedlings.
Citrus Greening.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Citrus Greening.description_np: अन्जिरको हरियो रोग फसिलिड कीराले फैलाउने घातक जीवाणुजन्य रोग हो। यसले पात पहेँलो हुने र फल बिग्रिने गराउँछ। यसको कुनै उपचार छैन।
Citrus Greening.cause_np: क्यान्डिडाटस लिबेरिब्याक्टर नामक जीवाणुले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Citrus Greening.symptoms_np: पातमा पहेँलो धब्बा, फल बिग्रिने र अकालमा झर्ने।
Citrus Greening.treatment_np: यसको कुनै उपचार छैन। संक्रमित रुख तुरुन्त हटाउने।
Citrus Greening.prevention_np: फसिलिड कीरा नियन्त्रण गर्ने र रोगमुक्त बिरुवा प्रयोग गर्ने।

Citrus Healthy.description: The citrus leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration and no visible signs of canker, greening, or other diseases.
Citrus Healthy.symptoms: Leaf appears healthy with normal green color.
Citrus Healthy.prevention: Continue regular monitoring and maintain proper soil pH (6.0-7.0).
Citrus Healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Citrus Healthy.description_np: अन्जिरको पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ, क्यान्कर वा हरियो रोग जस्तो कुनै रोग देखिएको छैन।

Coffee NoRust.description: The coffee leaf shows no signs of rust infection. The leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration.
Coffee NoRust.cause: No visible disease detected. Leaf appears healthy.
Coffee NoRust.symptoms: Normal green leaf with no signs of rust infection.
Coffee NoRust.prevention: Continue regular monitoring and maintain proper shade management.
Coffee NoRust.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Coffee NoRust.description_np: कफीको पातमा खिया रोगको कुनै लक्षण देखिएको छैन। पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ।

Coffee Rust.description: Coffee rust is a devastating fungal disease of coffee caused by Hemileia vastatrix. It produces yellow-orange powdery spots on the underside of leaves, leading to severe defoliation and yield loss.
Coffee Rust.cause: Fungal disease caused by Hemileia vastatrix.
Coffee Rust.symptoms: Yellow-orange powdery spots on the underside of leaves leading to defoliation.
Coffee Rust.treatment: Apply fungicides and remove severely infected leaves.
Coffee Rust.prevention: Plant resistant varieties and maintain proper shade management.
Coffee Rust.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Coffee Rust.description_np: कफीको खिया रोग हेमिलेइया भास्टाट्रिक्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने भयानक रोग हो। यसले पातको मुनि पहेंलो-सुन्तले धुलो देखाउँछ।
Coffee Rust.cause_np: हेमिलेइया भास्टाट्रिक्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Coffee Rust.treatment_np: कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने र संक्रमित पात हटाउने।
Coffee Rust.prevention_np: प्रतिरोधी प्रजाति रोप्ने र छाँया व्यवस्थापन गर्ने।

Corn (maize) Common rust.description: Common rust is a fungal disease of corn caused by Puccinia sorghi. It produces small reddish-brown pustules on both leaf surfaces, reducing photosynthesis and yield in severe infections.
Corn (maize) Common rust.cause: Fungal disease caused by Puccinia sorghi.
Corn (maize) Common rust.symptoms: Small reddish-brown pustules on both leaf surfaces.
Corn (maize) Common rust.treatment: Apply fungicide at early symptom stage. Consult an agricultural expert.
Corn (maize) Common rust.prevention: Use resistant hybrids and practice crop rotation.
Corn (maize) Common rust.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Corn (maize) Common rust.description_np: मकैको सामान्य खिया रोग पुक्सिनिया सोर्घी नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग हो। यसले पातमा रातो-खैरो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Corn (maize) Common rust.cause_np: पुक्सिनिया सोर्घी नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Corn (maize) Common rust.prevention_np: प्रतिरोधी प्रजाति प्रयोग गर्ने र बाली चक्र अपनाउने।

Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.description: Northern leaf blight is a fungal disease of corn caused by Exserohilum turcicum. It produces long, elliptical gray-green lesions on leaves that reduce photosynthetic capacity and yield.
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.cause: Fungal disease caused by Exserohilum turcicum.
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.symptoms: Long elliptical gray-green lesions on leaves.
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.treatment: Remove infected leaves and apply fungicide. Consult an agricultural expert.
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.prevention: Use resistant varieties and practice crop rotation.
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.description_np: मकैको उत्तरी पात झर्ने रोग एक्सेरोहिलम टुर्सिकम नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग हो। यसले पातमा लामो खैरो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.cause_np: एक्सेरोहिलम टुर्सिकम नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.treatment_np: संक्रमित पात हटाउने र कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने।
Corn (maize) Northern Leaf Blight.prevention_np: प्रतिरोधी प्रजाति प्रयोग गर्ने र बाली चक्र अपनाउने।

Corn (maize) healthy.description: The corn leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration and no visible signs of rust, blight, or other diseases.
Corn (maize) healthy.symptoms: Leaf appears healthy with normal green color.
Corn (maize) healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Corn (maize) healthy.description_np: मकैको पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ, कुनै रोगको लक्षण देखिएको छैन।

Mango Anthracnose.description: Anthracnose is a common fungal disease of mango caused by Colletotrichum gloeosporioides. It causes dark brown irregular spots on leaves, blossom blight, and fruit rot, especially in wet conditions.
Mango Anthracnose.cause: Fungal disease caused by Colletotrichum gloeosporioides.
Mango Anthracnose.symptoms: Dark brown irregular spots on leaves, blossom blight, fruit rot.
Mango Anthracnose.treatment: Apply fungicide during flowering and fruit development. Consult an expert.
Mango Anthracnose.prevention: Prune for air circulation and avoid overhead irrigation.
Mango Anthracnose.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Mango Anthracnose.description_np: आँपको एन्थ्राक्नोज रोग कोलेटोट्राइकम ग्लोइओस्पोरियोइड्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने सामान्य रोग हो। यसले पात र फलमा गाढा खैरो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Mango Anthracnose.cause_np: कोलेटोट्राइकम ग्लोइओस्पोरियोइड्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Mango Anthracnose.symptoms_np: पातमा गाढा खैरो धब्बा, फूल र फल सड्ने।
Mango Anthracnose.treatment_np: फूल फुल्ने र फल लाग्ने समयमा कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने।
Mango Anthracnose.prevention_np: हावा संचारको लागि छाँट्ने र धेरै पानी नदिने।

Mango Healthy.description: The mango leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration and no visible signs of anthracnose, powdery mildew, or other diseases.
Mango Healthy.symptoms: Leaf appears healthy with normal green color.
Mango Healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Mango Healthy.description_np: आँपको पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ, कुनै रोगको लक्षण देखिएको छैन।

Mango Powdery Mildew.description: Powdery mildew is a fungal disease of mango caused by Oidium mangiferae. It appears as a white powdery coating on leaves, flowers, and young fruit, reducing fruit set and yield.
Mango Powdery Mildew.cause: Fungal disease caused by Oidium mangiferae.
Mango Powdery Mildew.symptoms: White powdery coating on leaves, flowers, and young fruit.
Mango Powdery Mildew.treatment: Apply sulfur-based fungicides. Consult an agricultural expert.
Mango Powdery Mildew.prevention: Improve air circulation and avoid dense planting.
Mango Powdery Mildew.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Mango Powdery Mildew.description_np: आँपको सेतो फफूँद रोग ओडियम म्याङ्गिफेरा नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग हो। यसले पात, फूल र फलमा सेतो धुलो देखाउँछ।
Mango Powdery Mildew.cause_np: ओडियम म्याङ्गिफेरा नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Mango Powdery Mildew.symptoms_np: पात, फूल र फलमा सेतो धुलो देखिने।

Potato Late blight.description: Late blight is a devastating fungal-like disease of potato caused by Phytophthora infestans. It causes dark water-soaked spots on leaves and stems with white mold under leaves, and can destroy entire fields rapidly.
Potato Late blight.cause: Fungal-like disease caused by Phytophthora infestans.
Potato Late blight.symptoms: Dark brown water-soaked spots on leaves and stems, white mold under leaves.
Potato Late blight.treatment: Remove infected plants and apply fungicide immediately.
Potato Late blight.prevention: Avoid excess moisture and use resistant varieties.
Potato Late blight.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Potato Late blight.description_np: आलुको ढिलो पात झर्ने रोग फाइटोफ्थोरा इन्फेस्ट्यान्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने भयानक रोग हो। यसले पातमा गाढा खैरो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Potato Late blight.cause_np: फाइटोफ्थोरा इन्फेस्ट्यान्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Potato Late blight.symptoms_np: पातमा गाढा खैरो पानी परे जस्तो धब्बा, पात मुनि सेतो फफूँद।
Potato Late blight.treatment_np: संक्रमित बोट हटाउने र तुरुन्त कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने।
Potato Late blight.prevention_np: अत्यधिक पानी नदिने र प्रतिरोधी प्रजाति प्रयोग गर्ने।

Potato healthy.description: The potato leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration and no visible signs of late blight or other diseases.
Potato healthy.symptoms: Leaf appears healthy with normal green color.
Potato healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Potato healthy.description_np: आलुको पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ, कुनै रोगको लक्षण देखिएको छैन।

Rice Bacterial leaf blight.description: Bacterial leaf blight is a serious bacterial disease of rice caused by Xanthomonas oryzae. It produces water-soaked lesions along leaf margins that turn yellow to white, severely reducing yield.
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.cause: Bacterial disease caused by Xanthomonas oryzae pv. oryzae.
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.symptoms: Water-soaked lesions on leaf margins that turn yellow to white.
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.treatment: Remove infected plants and apply copper-based bactericides.
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.prevention: Use resistant varieties and avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer.
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.description_np: धानको जीवाणुजन्य पात झर्ने रोग जान्थोमोनास ओराइजा नामक जीवाणुले गर्दा हुने गम्भीर रोग हो। यसले पातको किनाराबाट सेतो हुँदै जाने धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.cause_np: जान्थोमोनास ओराइजा नामक जीवाणुले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.symptoms_np: पातको किनारबाट पानी परेको जस्तो धब्बा सुरु भई सेतो हुँदै जाने।
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.treatment_np: संक्रमित बोट हटाउने र तामा आधारित औषधि प्रयोग गर्ने।
Rice Bacterial leaf blight.prevention_np: प्रतिरोधी प्रजाति प्रयोग गर्ने र धेरै नाइट्रोजन मल नदिने।

Rice Brown spot.description: Brown spot is a fungal disease of rice caused by Bipolaris oryzae. It produces small circular brown spots with gray centers on leaves, reducing grain yield and quality.
Rice Brown spot.cause: Fungal disease caused by Bipolaris oryzae (Cochliobolus miyabeanus).
Rice Brown spot.symptoms: Small circular brown spots with gray centers on leaves.
Rice Brown spot.treatment: Apply fungicide and improve soil nutrient management. Consult an expert.
Rice Brown spot.prevention: Use balanced fertilization and disease-free seeds.
Rice Brown spot.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Rice Brown spot.description_np: धानको खैरो धब्बा रोग बाइपोलारिस ओराइजा नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग हो। यसले पातमा सानो गोलो खैरो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Rice Brown spot.cause_np: बाइपोलारिस ओराइजा नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Rice Brown spot.symptoms_np: पातमा सानो गोलो खैरो धब्बा देखिने।
Rice Brown spot.treatment_np: कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने र मलखाद सन्तुलन गर्ने।
Rice Brown spot.prevention_np: सन्तुलित मल प्रयोग गर्ने र रोगमुक्त बीउ प्रयोग गर्ने।

Rice Leaf smut.description: Leaf smut is a minor fungal disease of rice caused by Entyloma oryzae. It produces small black angular spots on older leaves and is generally not economically damaging.
Rice Leaf smut.cause: Fungal disease caused by Entyloma oryzae.
Rice Leaf smut.symptoms: Small black angular spots on leaves, usually on older leaves.
Rice Leaf smut.treatment: Generally not destructive. Apply fungicide if severe. Consult an expert.
Rice Leaf smut.prevention: Maintain field hygiene and use resistant varieties.
Rice Leaf smut.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Rice Leaf smut.description_np: धानको पात कालो दाग रोग एन्टाइलोमा ओराइजा नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने सामान्य रोग हो। यसले पुरानो पातमा सानो कालो धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Rice Leaf smut.cause_np: एन्टाइलोमा ओराइजा नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Rice Leaf smut.treatment_np: सामान्यतया हानिकारक छैन। गम्भीर भए कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने।

Tomato Bacterial spot.description: Bacterial spot is a bacterial disease of tomato caused by Xanthomonas campestris. It produces dark water-soaked spots with yellow halos on leaves and fruit, reducing yield and marketability.
Tomato Bacterial spot.cause: Bacterial disease caused by Xanthomonas campestris pv. vesicatoria.
Tomato Bacterial spot.symptoms: Dark water-soaked spots on leaves with yellow halos, fruit lesions.
Tomato Bacterial spot.treatment: Remove infected plants and apply copper-based sprays.
Tomato Bacterial spot.prevention: Use disease-free seeds and avoid overhead irrigation.
Tomato Bacterial spot.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Tomato Bacterial spot.description_np: टमाटरको जीवाणुजन्य धब्बा रोग जान्थोमोनास क्याम्पेस्ट्रिस नामक जीवाणुले गर्दा हुने रोग हो। यसले पात र फलमा गाढा धब्बा देखाउँछ।
Tomato Bacterial spot.cause_np: जान्थोमोनास क्याम्पेस्ट्रिस नामक जीवाणुले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Tomato Bacterial spot.symptoms_np: पातमा गाढा पानी परेको जस्तो धब्बा, फलमा घाउ।
Tomato Bacterial spot.treatment_np: संक्रमित बोट हटाउने र तामा आधारित स्प्रे प्रयोग गर्ने।
Tomato Bacterial spot.prevention_np: रोगमुक्त बीउ प्रयोग गर्ने र माथिबाट पानी नहाल्ने।

Tomato Late blight.description: Late blight is a devastating fungal-like disease of tomato caused by Phytophthora infestans. It produces large dark lesions on leaves and stems with white mold in humid conditions, and can destroy entire plants rapidly.
Tomato Late blight.cause: Fungal-like disease caused by Phytophthora infestans.
Tomato Late blight.symptoms: Large dark lesions on leaves and stems, white mold in humid conditions.
Tomato Late blight.treatment: Remove infected plants and apply fungicide immediately.
Tomato Late blight.prevention: Improve spacing, avoid wet foliage, and use resistant varieties.
Tomato Late blight.disclaimer: This is general guidance only. Consult an agricultural expert before treatment.
Tomato Late blight.description_np: टमाटरको ढिलो पात झर्ने रोग फाइटोफ्थोरा इन्फेस्ट्यान्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने भयानक रोग हो। यसले पात र खोज्टोमा ठूलो गाढा घाउ देखाउँछ।
Tomato Late blight.cause_np: फाइटोफ्थोरा इन्फेस्ट्यान्स नामक कवकले गर्दा हुने रोग।
Tomato Late blight.symptoms_np: पात र खोज्टोमा ठूलो गाढा घाउ, ओसिलोमा सेतो फफूँद।
Tomato Late blight.treatment_np: संक्रमित बोट हटाउने र तुरुन्त कवकनाशक प्रयोग गर्ने।
Tomato Late blight.prevention_np: बोटबीच दूरी राख्ने र प्रतिरोधी प्रजाति प्रयोग गर्ने।

Tomato healthy.description: The tomato leaf appears healthy with normal green coloration and no visible signs of bacterial spot, late blight, or other diseases.
Tomato healthy.symptoms: Leaf appears healthy with normal green color.
Tomato healthy.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Tomato healthy.description_np: टमाटरको पात स्वस्थ र हरियो छ, कुनै रोगको लक्षण देखिएको छैन।

Unknown.description: The uploaded image does not match any known crop disease in the training dataset. This could be a non-leaf object, an unfamiliar disease, or a poor-quality photo. Please upload a clear image of a crop leaf.
Unknown.cause: The image does not match any known crop disease in the training dataset.
Unknown.symptoms: No recognizable disease symptoms detected. The image may be a non-leaf object, an unfamiliar disease, or a poor-quality photo.
Unknown.treatment: Upload a clear image of a leaf from a supported crop. Consult an agricultural expert for further diagnosis.
Unknown.prevention: Ensure good lighting and focus when taking photos. Only upload images of crop leaves.
Unknown.disclaimer: AI result should be verified if symptoms appear later.
Unknown.description_np: अपलोड गरिएको तस्वीर कुनै ज्ञात बाली रोगसँग मेल खाँदैन। यो पात नभएको वस्तु, अपरिचित रोग, वा कम गुणस्तरको फोटो हुन सक्छ। कृपया स्पष्ट पातको तस्वीर अपलोड गर्नुहोस्।
Unknown.cause_np: यो तस्वीर कुनै ज्ञात बाली रोगसँग मेल खाँदैन।
Unknown.symptoms_np: कुनै पनि चिनिएको रोगका लक्षण देखिएन। कृपया स्पष्ट पातको तस्वीर खिचेर पुन: प्रयास गर्नुहोस्।
Unknown.treatment_np: सहायक बालीको स्पष्ट पातको तस्वीर खिच्नुहोस्। कृषि विज्ञको सल्लाह लिनुहोस्।
Unknown.prevention_np: फोटो खिँदा राम्रो प्रकाश र फोकस सुनिश्चित गर्नुहोस्।
